Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseMultiplier_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the base multiplier for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data accuracy for developers to better understand player behavior.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the timing for retrying telemetry data transmission.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability of data collection for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets the time to wait before retrying telemetry data transmission.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum delay time for telemetry data retries.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that data reporting is efficient and timely, improving overall game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of telemetry requests that can be retried at once.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes performance by preventing overload from too many simultaneous retries.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum time limit for tracking data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by ensuring data collection does not slow down the game.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of retry attempts for data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data gathering for improving player experiences.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to retry HTTP requests if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability of data collection, leading to a better overall experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries connection attempts when initial connection fails, collecting data on failures.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability of connecting to games, reducing frustration for players when joining.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds a retry mechanism for DNS resolution failures in telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances reliability of data tracking, ensuring better insights into player behavior.
